evals.prompt: Review this GitHub issue critically and find any gaps or risks: https://github.com/romankurnovskii/aria-vega-market-maker/issues/8. Check with the relevant codebase.
evals.expected_output: Produces triage.json with verdict, root_cause_hypothesis, relevant_files, gaps_found, and new_bugs_risk. Does NOT write any code or tests. Posts a comment on the issue.
evals.must_not: Write code, run tests, attempt a fix, or proceed to Phase 2 without explicit user approval.

evals.prompt: Look at issue #8 in https://github.com/example/api-gateway — the rate limiter claim seems off. Review it against the codebase and tell me if it's a real bug.
evals.expected_output: triage.json with verdict confirmed or rejected. Clear explanation of whether the code matches the issue claim. relevant_files are actual paths from the repo.
evals.must_not: Invent file paths. Mark as confirmed without reading the code.

evals.prompt: Reproduce the bug from triage.json and write failing tests. Don't fix anything.
evals.expected_output: repro.json with repro_confirmed, test_file_path pointing to a real new test file, failing_tests list, edge_cases. The new test file exists and tests are actually failing.
evals.must_not: Fix the bug. Modify source files. Create tests that pass.

evals.prompt: Fix issue #8 based on repro.json and open a PR.
evals.expected_output: Branch created, PR opened, pr.json with pr_url, tests_all_pass true, regression_check_passed true. PR description links to issue and explains the fix.
evals.must_not: Fix bugs marked as out_of_scope in repro.json. Open PR if tests fail.

evals.prompt: Verify that the PR from pr.json actually fixes the issue and doesn't introduce regressions.
evals.expected_output: verify.json with verdict approved or needs_rework. PR comment posted. If needs_rework, rework_instructions is specific and actionable.
evals.must_not: Modify any code. Approve if issue tests still fail. Ignore new bugs found in diff.

evals.prompt: Review issue #42 end to end: https://github.com/example/payment-service/issues/42 — memory leak in webhook handler. Go through all phases.
evals.expected_output: All four handoff files produced in sequence. Each phase gates correctly. Final verify.json produced. No phase skips its input check.
evals.must_not: Skip triage before reproduce. Start fix without confirmed repro. Approve a PR with failing tests.
